# Irrwisch Choco Banana

This is a [Choco Banana](https://puzz.link/rules.html?cbanana) with Irrwisch clues - each instance of the _same_ letter represents a _different_ value.

[![Click to solve on Penpa+](../../images/puzzles/2025/irrwischChocoBanana1.png)](https://swaroopg92.github.io/penpa-edit/#m=solve&&a=VY3LDcQgDAV74ZxDwOZXC0r/bWRncloJjWy/D+eUet/l+rHKJlNOuWFdsOlpIb+LatgQqqEaHaZt6SXtzO9uc5odpobqQLUs2AODiRyAtWPv9Bo0N7FMOieWhbCYNtPm+93Lc52/97w=)
